title: 10 best herbal capsules for sunburn

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe capsules helps with sunburn because they contain the soothing and moisturizing properties of aloe vera, which is naturally cooling and anti-inflammatory. When taken internally, these capsules help to reduce skin inflammation and alleviate discomfort associated with sunburn. The antioxidants present in aloe vera also help to protect the skin from further damage caused by UV radiation, promoting faster healing and reducing the risk of peeling and scarring. As a result, herbal aloe capsules provide effective relief from sunburn pain and discomfort.
remedy_properties: Gel-rich polysaccharides: These molecules help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation caused by sunburn.
Vitamins A, C, and E: These antioxidants neutralize free radicals and repair damaged skin cells, promoting healthy tissue regeneration and minimizing the appearance of sun-damaged skin.
Anthraquinones: These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce swelling, itching, and pain associated with severe sunburn.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the aloe plant are rich in vitamins and minerals that help soothe and calm sunburned skin, reducing inflammation and promoting healing.
Leaves: Aloe vera leaves contain a high concentration of aloin, a natural substance that helps to reduce pain and discomfort caused by sunburn, as well as promote healthy skin cell growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20 grams of fresh aloe vera leaves and clean them thoroughly under running water.
Extract the gel from the inner part of the aloe vera leaf using a juicer or blender.
Mix the extracted gel with 10 milliliters of distilled water and let it steep for 30 minutes at room temperature.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass bowl, discarding the solids.
Fill clean capsules with 500 milligrams each of the resulting liquid and seal them tightly for storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold capsules helps with sunburn because they contain calendula, a natural anti-inflammatory agent that soothes and cools the skin. Calendula has been traditionally used to treat burns, wounds, and skin irritations, and its potent antioxidant properties help reduce redness, swelling, and pain associated with sunburn. Additionally, the capsules' moisturizing properties help lock in moisture, promoting healthy skin regeneration and reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles caused by excessive sun exposure. As a result, pot marigold capsules provide quick relief from sunburn discomfort while promoting long-term skin health.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant and Anti-inflammatory Compounds: Pot Marigold capsules contain antioxidants like flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids that help neutralize free radicals and reduce inflammation caused by sunburn.
Wound Healing Properties: The herb's anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties promote wound healing by reducing swelling, pain, and infection, which can aid in the recovery of sunburned skin.

Skin Soothing and Protective Compounds: Pot Marigold capsules contain triterpenoid saponins that have a soothing effect on skin irritations, providing protection against further damage from UV radiation and promoting healthy skin regeneration.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the pot marigold contain flavonoids and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe sunburned skin.
Seeds: Pot marigold seeds contain omega-3 fatty acids and antioxidants that can help reduce inflammation and promote healing in sunburned skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh calendula flowers in the morning, ensuring they are dry and free of contaminants.
Dry the harvested flowers using a food dehydrator at 70°f for 24 hours or air-drying for 7 days.
Grind the dried flowers into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle to achieve 200-250 mg per capsule.
Mix the powdered calendula with 500 mg of gelatin in a small bowl, adding water as needed to create a uniform paste.
Fill empty capsules with the prepared mixture, achieving a total weight of 700-750 mg per capsule, and store them in an airtight container for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile capsules helps with sunburn because they contain the soothing properties of the herb, which calm and cool the skin. The antioxidants present in chamomile also help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress caused by sun exposure, resulting in a faster recovery from sunburn. Additionally, chamomile's anti-inflammatory compounds can ease pain and discomfort associated with sunburn, promoting relaxation and reducing redness and swelling. As a natural remedy, chamomile capsules offer a gentle and effective way to alleviate the effects of sunburn.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Chamomile contains anti-inflammatory compounds like apigenin, which can help reduce inflammation and alleviate redness and swelling associated with sunburn.

Antioxidant activity: Chamomile's antioxidant properties can help neutralize free radicals caused by UV radiation, reducing oxidative stress and damage to skin cells, which can accelerate the healing process of sunburned skin.

Soothing and calming effects: Chamomile's flavonoids and terpenoids have a sedative and anti-anxiety effect, helping to calm irritated skin and reduce discomfort associated with sunburn, allowing for a more comfortable recovery.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Rich in apigenin, an flavonoid that helps soothe and calm skin irritation caused by sunburn.
Roots: Contain anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce redness and swelling associated with sunburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh matricaria chamomilla flowers in mid-morning when petals are fully open, collecting 10-12 ounces for drying.
Dry the harvested flowers using a dehydrator on low heat or air circulation at 70°f for 24 hours to remove moisture.
Grind 8 ounces of dried chamomile flowers into fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle within 48 hours.
Mix 400-500 milligrams of ground chamomile with 100-200 milliliters of cold-pressed coconut oil in a glass jar, stirring until well combined.
Fill gelatin capsules with the chamomile-coconut oil mixture and store them in an airtight container in a cool, dark place for up to one year.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsules helps with sunburn because they provide soothing relief to damaged skin. The gel-like substance inside the capsules, extracted from marshmallow root, forms a protective barrier on the skin's surface, reducing inflammation and pain caused by UV radiation. Additionally, marshmallow's mucilaginous properties help to lock in moisture, promoting rapid healing and reducing peeling. By taking herbal marshmallow capsules regularly, you can enjoy a natural and effective solution to alleviate sunburn discomfort and promote healthy, hydrated skin.
remedy_properties: Mucilage content: Marshmallow root contains a high amount of mucilage, a thick, protective gel-like substance that helps to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation caused by sunburn.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Herbal marshmallow capsules have anti-inflammatory compounds that can help reduce swelling and pain associated with sunburn, making them an effective natural remedy for alleviating discomfort.

Antioxidant activity: Marshmallow root is rich in antioxidants that neutralize free radicals formed during sun exposure, which can help prevent further damage to the skin and promote faster healing from sunburn.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in mucilage, a thick, protective substance that helps soothe and calm sunburned skin.
Rhyzomes: Contain antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce redness and swelling associated with sunburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest althaea officinalis roots in the morning after dew has evaporated, gathering at least one pound of fresh material for drying.
Dry the harvested roots by spreading them thinly on paper bags or a clean towel, allowing 7-10 days for air circulation and moisture evaporation.
Grind dried roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle, taking approximately 20 minutes to achieve the desired texture.
Mix 500 milligrams of powdered althaea officinalis with 250 milliliters of distilled water to create a liquid extract, allowing 30 minutes for infusion.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the prepared herbal extract and seal tightly, resulting in 120-150 capsules that can be stored in an airtight container for up to two years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's Wort capsules helps with sunburn because of its natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The herb contains hyperforin, a compound that has been shown to reduce inflammation and pain associated with sunburn. Additionally, St John's Wort's antioxidant properties help to neutralize free radicals caused by UV radiation, which can further exacerbate sunburn symptoms such as redness, swelling, and itching. By taking St John's Wort capsules, individuals may experience relief from sunburn discomfort, reducing the need for harsh chemical-based treatments.
remedy_properties: Flavonoids: Flavonoids in St John's Wort capsules, such as hyperoside and quercetin, have anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce redness, swelling, and discomfort caused by sunburn.

Hypericin: Hypericin, a key constituent of St John's Wort, has antioxidant properties that help to protect the skin from further damage caused by UV radiation and reduce oxidative stress caused by sun exposure.

Antioxidants: The antioxidants present in St John's Wort capsules, including phenolic acids and flavonoids, help to neutralize free radicals generated by sunburn, reducing the risk of skin cell damage and promoting healing.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which help soothe and calm sun-damaged skin.
Flowers: Contain hyperforin and hypericin, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that aid in reducing redness and swelling caused by sunburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest hypericum perforatum flowers at peak bloom and dry them thoroughly in a warm oven or dehydrator within 24 hours.
Grind the dried flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 1 part ground st john's wort with 4 parts carrier herb such as rice flour to create a uniform blend for easy dosing.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with approximately 400-500mg of the st john's wort blend and seal securely.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months or freeze for longer preservation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with sunburn because they contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory properties. When taken orally, it can help to reduce redness, swelling, and pain associated with sunburn. Additionally, licorice extract contains flavonoids, which are known for their antioxidant properties, helping to protect the skin from further damage caused by UV radiation. By taking herbal licorice capsules after a sunburn, individuals may experience faster healing, reduced discomfort, and a healthier-looking complexion.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compound: Glycyrrhizin: Reduces redness, swelling, and pain associated with sunburn by inhibiting the production of inflammatory mediators.

Antioxidant properties: Neutralizes free radicals caused by UV radiation, thereby protecting the skin from oxidative damage and reducing the risk of further complications like premature aging and cancer.
Soothing and moisturizing compounds: Saponins: Provides relief from sunburned skin by creating a soothing barrier that helps retain moisture, reducing dryness and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the licorice plant contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, making them effective in reducing redness and swelling associated with sunburn.
Barks: The barks of the licorice plant are used to make a paste that can be applied topically to soothe sunburned skin and reduce the risk of blistering.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots in late summer for maximum potency and quality.
Dry the harvested roots in a warm dry place or using a food dehydrator at 60°c for 24 hours.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for 30 minutes.
Mix 250 milligrams of powdered root with 100 milliliters of distilled water to create an herbal extract, stirring for 10 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams of the herbal extract mixture and seal immediately using a capsule filler device.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Asiatic pennywort capsules helps with sunburn because of its potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal extract is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids that work synergistically to soothe and calm the skin. When applied topically or taken orally as a supplement, Asiatic pennywort can help reduce redness, swelling, and discomfort associated with sunburn. It also promotes skin repair and regeneration by stimulating collagen production and improving skin hydration levels, resulting in faster recovery from sunburn damage.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Asian Pennywort contains antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals generated by UV radiation, reducing oxidative stress and inflammation caused by sunburn.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The herb has been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines, which can contribute to redness, swelling, and pain associated with sunburn, helping to soothe and calm the skin.
Wound healing properties: Asian Pennywort's bioactive compounds may enhance collagen synthesis, improve skin elasticity, and promote wound closure, aiding in the recovery process of sunburned skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe and calm sunburned skin.
Rhyzomes: Containing bioactive compounds like saponins and alkaloids, which provide antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects to reduce sunburn redness and discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh centella asiatica leaves and clean them thoroughly under running water.
Dry the cleaned leaves in a well-ventilated area at room temperature for 7 days.
Grind dried centella asiatica leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 500mg of ground centella asiatica powder with 100mg of magnesium stearate as a lubricant and fill into gelatin capsules.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months prior to use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with sunburn because of its potent anti-inflammatory compound, curcumin. When taken orally, curcumin reduces inflammation and oxidative stress caused by UV radiation, which is responsible for sunburn. Additionally, curcumin's antioxidant properties help protect the skin from further damage, promoting faster healing and reducing redness and swelling associated with sunburn. By taking turmeric capsules before or after exposure to the sun, individuals can naturally alleviate symptoms of sunburn and soothe their skin.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Turmeric contains curcuminoids, which have potent anti-inflammatory effects that can reduce redness, swelling, and discomfort caused by sunburn.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants in turmeric capsules, such as curcumin and demethoxycurcumin, can help protect the skin from further damage caused by free radicals generated by UV radiation, promoting faster healing and reducing the risk of long-term skin damage.

Wound-healing enhancement: Turmeric's wound-healing properties can stimulate collagen synthesis, improve blood flow, and enhance tissue repair, all of which can aid in the recovery process for sunburned skin.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Turmeric rhyzomes contain curcumin, a powerful anti-inflammatory compound that helps reduce inflammation and alleviate pain associated with sunburn.
Buds: The buds of the turmeric plant have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat skin conditions, including burns, due to their antiseptic and antibacterial properties.
remedy_recipe: Measure and grind 2 cups of dried turmeric roots into a fine powder using an electric coffee grinder.
Mix the ground turmeric with 1 cup of dibasic calcium phosphate filler and 0.5 cup of silica gel for flow enhancement.
Add 10ml of glycerin as a binding agent to the mixture and blend until well combined.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 500mg of the turmeric-calcium-silica-glycerin mixture and seal using a capsule filler machine.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years or refrigerate for longer storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger capsules helps with sunburn because they contain a potent anti-inflammatory compound called gingerol, which helps to reduce redness, swelling, and pain associated with sunburn. The capsules also possess antioxidant properties that help to neutralize free radicals caused by UV radiation, thereby preventing further damage to the skin. Additionally, ginger has been shown to promote blood flow and increase collagen production, which can aid in the healing process of sunburned skin, leaving it feeling smoother and healthier.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Herbal ginger capsules contain compounds like gingerol and shogaol, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and pain associated with sunburn, helping to soothe and calm the skin.

Antioxidant properties: Ginger has antioxidant properties that help protect the skin from further damage caused by free radicals, which can accelerate the healing process and reduce the risk of blistering or peeling.

Warming and soothing properties: Herbal ginger capsules can help increase blood flow to the affected area, reducing swelling and discomfort, and providing a natural, gentle warming sensation that can be very comforting for sunburned skin.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Containing compounds like gingerol and shogaol, rhyzomes have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help soothe and calm sunburned skin.
Barks: Rich in flavonoids and terpenes, barks have been traditionally used to treat skin conditions like eczema and sunburn, offering relief from itching, redness, and swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried zingiber officinale root powder from a reputable supplier.
Measure out 250mg of the dried ginger root powder into a clean bowl.
Mix 50mg of vitamin e oil and 25mg of aloe vera gel with the ginger powder.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the ginger mixture and seal them tightly.
Store the finished herbal ginger capsules in an airtight container for up to two years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Red clover capsules helps with sunburn because they contain isoflavones, a type of bioflavonoid that has potent antioxidant properties. These antioxidants help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing inflammation and redness caused by sunburn. The isoflavones also have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to alleviate discomfort and pain associated with sunburn. Additionally, the capsules may aid in promoting collagen production, helping to improve skin elasticity and reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles left behind after a sunburn.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Red clover contains isoflavones, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain associated with sunburn.
Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in red clover capsules help neutralize free radicals caused by UV radiation, reducing oxidative stress and damage to skin cells.
Skin-soothing properties: The isoflavones and other compounds in red clover have been shown to calm and soothe the skin, reducing redness, itching, and discomfort associated with sunburn.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which help soothe and calm sun-damaged skin.
Buds: Contain triterpenoid saponins that have anti-inflammatory properties, reducing redness and swelling caused by sunburn.
remedy_recipe: Gather 50 grams of dried red clover flowers, carefully harvested from organic fields in the morning.
Grind the dried red clover flowers into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix one part ground red clover powder with two parts carrier powder such as silicon dioxide and fill 500 empty gelatin capsules with the blend.
Place the filled capsules in an airtight container, protecting them from moisture and light for at least 30 days before use.
Store the herbal red clover capsules at room temperature, using within one year of preparation and following recommended dosages of two capsules per day taken orally with water.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for sunburn are natural supplements containing extracts from various plants that help alleviate sunburn symptoms, such as redness, inflammation, and pain. The best herbal capsules for sunburn include Calendula officinalis, Aloe barbadensis, Ginkgo biloba, Hypericum perforatum, Arnica montana, Aloe vera, Echinacea purpurea, Hamamelis virginiana, Curcuma longa, and Silybum marianum. If left untreated, sunburn can lead to prolonged discomfort, increased risk of skin cancer, and even long-term damage to skin, ultimately affecting a person's quality of life, daily activities, and overall well-being.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat sunburn with herbal capsules is to take a supplement that combines Aloe vera, Chamomile, and Green Tea extracts. These herbs help soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and redness. Look for products containing 100mg of Aloe vera per serving, along with 50-100mg of Chamomile and Green Tea extracts. Take the recommended dose twice a day to promote healing and reduce discomfort associated with sunburn.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to sunburn that are treated with herbal capsules are skin conditions such as eczema, psoriasis, and dermatitis. Herbs like aloe vera, chamomile, and calendula are commonly used in capsules to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Other conditions, like rosacea and acne, can also be treated with herbal supplements that help regulate hormones and reduce oxidative stress.

remedies.remedy_desc: Calendula officinalis capsules helps with sunburn because they contain the anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties of the Calendula flower. The plant's active compounds, such as triterpenoids and carotenoids, work to soothe and calm sunburned skin, reducing redness and inflammation. By promoting skin regeneration and tissue repair, Calendula capsules can help to accelerate the healing process, allowing sunburned skin to recover faster and more effectively. This natural remedy can provide relief from the discomfort and pain associated with sunburn.
remedy_constituents: Nascentin: Helps with sunburn by reducing inflammation and promoting healing through its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
Sesquiterpene lactones: Assist in soothing sunburn by inhibiting the release of histamine, a chemical involved in the inflammatory response, thereby reducing redness and discomfort.
Carotenoids (specifically, Calendula carotenoids): Function as antioxidants, protecting the skin from further damage caused by UV radiation and promoting the repair of sun-damaged skin cells.
remedy_parts: Flowers: The flowers of Calendula officinalis are used to make capsules for sunburn relief due to their high concentration of anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
Leaves: The leaves of Calendula officinalis are also used due to their ability to promote skin healing and reduce redness associated with sunburn.
Roots: The roots of Calendula officinalis contain bioactive compounds that aid in skin regeneration and protection, making them a valuable component in sunburn relief capsules.
remedy_recipe: Harvest the flowers of calendula officinalis when they are in full bloom and dry them completely within a week.
Dry the flowers in a low-temperature oven at 150 degrees fahrenheit for 2 hours or until crispy.
Grind 1 tablespoon of dried flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 30 seconds.
Mix the powder with 1 teaspoon of gelatin and 1/2 teaspoon of water to form a paste within 5 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the paste using a capsule filler machine and seal immediately.

remedies.remedy_desc: Aloe barbadensis capsules helps with sunburn because they contain the active ingredient aloe vera, which has anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. The gel-like extract from the aloe plant can help to reduce redness and swelling, while also promoting the healing process of sunburned skin. The antioxidants present in aloe vera capsules can also help to protect the skin from further damage caused by UV radiation, allowing the skin to recover from the sunburn more efficiently and effectively. This makes aloe vera capsules a popular natural remedy for sunburn relief.
remedy_constituents: Anthraquinones: These compounds help reduce inflammation and alleviate pain associated with sunburn by inhibiting the release of pro-inflammatory mediators.
Aldehydes and Esters: These compounds have a soothing and calming effect on sunburned skin, reducing redness and discomfort by preventing the breakdown of the skin's natural barrier function.

Vitamins and Minerals (A, C, and E): These antioxidants help protect the skin from further damage caused by UV radiation, promoting skin healing and reducing the risk of sunburn complications such as blistering and infection.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Extracted for their soothing and moisturizing properties, which help to reduce inflammation and promote healing.
Gel from Leaves: Used for its high water content and antioxidant properties, which help to calm and hydrate sunburned skin.
Juice from Leaves: Applied topically for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which help to reduce redness and prevent infection.
remedy_recipe: Harvest aloe barbadensis leaves in the morning when the plant is at its highest water content level.
Dry the aloe leaves in a cool place for 7 to 10 days to reduce moisture content.
Grind the dried aloe leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or spice grinder.
Mix the aloe powder with a small amount of natural filler such as silica gel in a ratio of 1000mg aloe to 100mg filler.
Fill a gelatin capsule with the aloe mixture and seal the capsule immediately to preserve freshness.

remedies.remedy_desc: Ginkgo biloba capsules helps with sunburn because of its antioxidant properties and anti-inflammatory capabilities. The flavonoids and terpenoids in Ginkgo biloba extract have been shown to protect skin cells from damage caused by UV radiation. By reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, Ginkgo biloba capsules can help alleviate sunburn symptoms such as redness, itching, and swelling. Additionally, its antioxidant properties can help neutralize free radicals that contribute to sunburn, promoting a faster recovery and soothing the affected skin.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: Help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress caused by sunburn by neutralizing free radicals and promoting the repair of damaged skin cells.
Bilobalide: Have anti-inflammatory properties that may help soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and discomfort associated with sunburn.

Quercetin: Possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that may help protect the skin from further damage, promote healing, and reduce the risk of complications such as infection or blistering.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used due to their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect the skin from damage and promote healing.

Seeds: They are used due to their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect the skin from damage and promote healing, and also contain ginkgolides that can help improve blood flow.
Buds: They are used due to their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect the skin from damage and promote healing.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 500 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves and flowers using a digital scale.
Grind the dried ginkgo biloba into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 20 grams of the powder with 20 grams of tapioca starch in a bowl.
Use a capsule machine to fill 200 empty capsules with the powder mixture in 20 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place for up to 6 months.

remedies.remedy_desc: Hypericum perforatum capsules helps with sunburn because they contain St. John's Wort, a natural herb rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These compounds help to reduce redness, swelling, and pain associated with sunburn, while also promoting skin repair and regeneration. By soothing and protecting the skin, Hypericum perforatum capsules can provide relief from sunburn discomfort, accelerating the healing process and reducing the risk of further damage.
remedy_constituents: Hyperforin: Acts as an anti-inflammatory agent, reducing redness and swelling associated with sunburn.
Quercetin: Functions as an antioxidant, protecting skin cells from damage caused by UV radiation and promoting healing.
N-feruloyltyramine: Possesses anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to soothe and repair damaged skin tissue.
remedy_parts: Flowers: They are used due to their high flavonoid content, particularly quercetin and kaempferol, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
Leaves: They are used due to their high concentration of hyperforin and hypericin, which have potent anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
Seeds: They are used due to their rich content of flavonoids and carotenoids, which provide antioxidant and protective effects against sun damage.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 250g of fresh hypericum perforatum flowers at peak bloom for optimal potency and quality.
Dry the flowers in a single layer at room temperature for 1 week to prevent spoilage.
Crush the dried flowers into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix 100g of the powdered flower with 100g of gelatin and add 100ml of distilled water to create a uniform mixture.
Fill gelatin capsules with 500mg of the mixture and seal immediately to prevent moisture absorption.

remedies.remedy_desc: Arnica montana capsules helps with sunburn because they contain the potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties of the Arnica plant. The capsules work to reduce pain and discomfort associated with sunburn, while also promoting the healing of damaged skin cells. The anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce redness and swelling, while the antioxidants work to protect the skin from further damage and promote collagen production, leading to faster recovery and reduced risk of scarring. This natural remedy supports the body's natural healing process.
remedy_constituents: Helenalin: This sesquiterpene lactone helps with sunburn by reducing inflammation and pain, and also exhibits anti-oxidative properties to protect the skin from further damage.
Nordihydroguaiaretic acid (NDGA): This phenolic compound has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that help soothe and repair sun-damaged skin.
Flavonoids: These compounds, particularly quercetin and kaempferol, possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that aid in reducing sunburn and promoting skin healing.
remedy_parts: Flowers: They are used due to their high content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and soothing properties.
Leaves: They are used due to their ability to provide antioxidant protection and anti-inflammatory effects.
Roots: They are used due to their rich content of arnalic acid, which has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties.
remedy_recipe: Dry 100g of arnica montana flowers in a low-temperature oven at 50°c for 24 hours to preserve their properties.
Grind the dried arnica montana flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 500mg of the arnica montana powder with 500mg of vegetable cellulose in a bowl to create a uniform blend.
Fill 50 empty gelatin capsules with the powder blend using a small spoon or capsule filler.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place for up to 6 months.

remedies.remedy_desc: Aloe vera capsules helps with sunburn because they contain the soothing and moisturizing properties of aloe vera in a convenient and easily digestible form. The gel extracted from the aloe vera plant has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help to reduce redness, swelling, and pain caused by sunburn. It also helps to hydrate the skin, promoting faster healing and reducing the risk of peeling and blistering, making it an effective way to alleviate sunburn symptoms.
remedy_constituents: Glucomannans: These complex carbohydrates help soothe and calm sunburned skin by reducing inflammation and promoting healing.
Aloin: This anthraquinone compound has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help reduce redness, swelling, and pain associated with sunburn.

Vitamins (especially vitamin A and vitamin E): These antioxidants help protect the skin from further damage caused by UV radiation, promote collagen synthesis, and support the healing process of sunburned skin.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The gel extracted from Aloe vera leaves is used due to its soothing and anti-inflammatory properties.
Leaves: The juice extracted from Aloe vera leaves is also used because it helps to reduce inflammation and promote skin healing.
Leaves: Aloe vera leaf extract is further used due to its antioxidant properties that help protect the skin from damage caused by UV radiation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 5-7 leaves of aloe vera from a mature plant with no signs of disease or pests.
Extract the clear gel from the leaves by cutting them open and scooping it out.
Mix the extracted gel with 1 tablespoon of vitamin e oil and 1 teaspoon of glycerin.
Fill a capsule machine with the mixture and fill capsules according to the manufacturer's instructions.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Echinacea purpurea capsules helps with sunburn because they are rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds. These properties help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and swelling associated with sunburn. The herbal extract also promotes wound healing and tissue repair, which can aid in the recovery process. Additionally, Echinacea's ability to boost the immune system can help the body to fight off any potential infections that may occur due to sunburn, promoting overall skin health.
remedy_constituents: Isoquinoline alkaloids: These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help reduce redness and swelling associated with sunburn, promoting faster skin recovery.
Cichoric acid: This phenolic compound has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help neutralize free radicals caused by UV radiation, reducing sunburn damage and promoting skin repair.

Caffeic acid: This phenolic compound has antioxidant properties, which help protect the skin from further damage caused by UV radiation, reducing the risk of skin irritation and promoting faster healing.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are used due to their high concentration of echinacosides, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
Flowers: The flowers are used because they are rich in alkylamides, which are thought to have anti-inflammatory and skin-protective effects.
Leaves: The leaves are used due to their content of rosmarinic acid, which has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that may help soothe sunburned skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 pound of dried echinacea purpurea roots and flowers at the peak of their potency and medicinal properties.
Dry the echinacea purpurea roots and flowers further if they have been harvested fresh in a low-temperature oven at 150°f for 2 hours.
Grind the dried echinacea purpurea roots and flowers into a fine powder using a high-speed blender or coffee grinder for 30 seconds.
Mix the echinacea purpurea powder with a binding agent such as gelatin or vegetable cellulose in a 1:1 ratio.
Fill gelatin capsules with a small amount of the echinacea purpurea powder mixture using a capsule filler and seal the capsules tightly.

remedies.remedy_desc: Hamamelis virginiana capsules helps with sunburn because they are rich in a compound called hamamelin, which has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. When applied topically or taken orally in capsule form, hamamelin can help soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness, itching, and swelling associated with sunburn. The antioxidant properties also help to neutralize free radicals that can cause further damage to the skin, promoting faster healing and reducing the risk of long-term skin damage.
remedy_constituents: Tannins: Help to reduce inflammation and soothe sunburned skin by constricting blood vessels and preventing fluid loss.
Flavonoids: Act as antioxidants to neutralize free radicals caused by UV radiation, reducing oxidative stress and promoting skin regeneration.
Hamamelitannin: Exerts anti-inflammatory and astringent properties to calm sunburned skin, reduce redness, and promote healing.
remedy_parts: Barks: The bark is rich in tannins, which help to soothe and protect the skin from sun damage.
Leaves: The leaves contain Hamamelin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them effective in reducing sunburn and promoting skin health.
Buds: The buds are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which help to reduce inflammation and protect the skin from further damage caused by sunburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of dried hamamelis virginiana leaves and twigs on a dry day after the first frost.
Dry the plant material further in a low-temperature oven at 40°c for 2 hours.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 1 part of the powder with 2 parts of gelatin to create a uniform blend.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 500mg of the powder blend and seal them securely.

remedies.remedy_desc: Curcuma longa capsules helps with sunburn because they contain curcumin, a potent anti-inflammatory compound that reduces redness and swelling. The antioxidant properties of curcumin also neutralize free radicals caused by UV radiation, which can damage skin cells. By inhibiting pro-inflammatory enzymes and promoting collagen synthesis, curcuma longa capsules help to accelerate the healing process of sunburned skin. This natural remedy provides soothing relief and can help to reduce the risk of further damage and promote a smooth recovery.
remedy_constituents: Curcumin: It has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce redness, swelling, and pain associated with sunburn.
Demethoxycurcumin: It exhibits strong antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help protect the skin from further damage caused by UV radiation and promote the healing process of sunburn.

Beta-Caryophyllene: It has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce the pain and discomfort associated with sunburn, and its antioxidant effects also aid in protecting the skin from oxidative stress caused by UV radiation.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: These underground stems are used for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help soothe sunburned skin.
Leaves: Turmeric leaves are used for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help reduce redness and prevent infection in sunburned skin.
Roots: Turmeric roots are used for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help reduce pain, inflammation, and damage caused by sunburn.
remedy_recipe: Dry 500 grams of curcuma longa root in a low-temperature oven at 50 degrees celsius for 2 hours.
Grind the dried curcuma longa root into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 150 grams of the powder with 75 grams of gelatin in a bowl.
Heat 50 milliliters of water in a saucepan and dissolve the gelatin mixture in it.
Pour the mixture into empty gelatin capsules and seal them tightly immediately.

remedies.remedy_desc: Silybum marianum capsules helps with sunburn because they contain the herb milk thistle, which is rich in flavonoids and silymarin. These compounds have potent antioxidant properties that help to neutralize free radicals and reduce inflammation caused by UV radiation. Silymarin also has anti-inflammatory properties that can help to soothe and calm sunburned skin, promoting faster healing and reducing pain and discomfort. This makes Silybum marianum capsules a natural and effective remedy for alleviating the symptoms of sunburn.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: They help protect the skin from oxidative stress and inflammation caused by UV radiation, which reduces the severity of sunburn.
Phenolic acids: They have antioxidant properties that neutralize free radicals generated by UV radiation, thus reducing damage to skin cells and promoting healing.
Silymarin: It has anti-inflammatory properties that reduce redness, swelling, and pain associated with sunburn, as well as antioxidant properties that help repair damaged skin cells.
remedy_parts: Seeds: Silybum marianum seeds are used to make capsules for sunburn due to their high silymarin content, which helps protect the skin from damage and promotes healing.
Leaves: Silybum marianum leaves are used to make capsules for sunburn due to their antioxidant properties, which help reduce inflammation and promote skin regeneration.
Flowers: Silybum marianum flowers are used to make capsules for sunburn due to their high flavonoid content, which helps protect the skin from UV damage and soothe sunburned skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of dried silybum marianum flowers and leaves and store them in an airtight container.
Grind 15g of the dried silybum marianum flowers and leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered silybum marianum with 75g of gelatin and 25g of glycerin to create a uniform blend.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 500mg of the silybum marianum blend and seal them properly using a capsule machine.
Label the capsules with the name silybum marianum and the date of preparation in a clear and legible manner.
